name: rung_90_spacing_direction_consistency_stress
utterances: Zed has Yan as a parent.
Bea has Abe as a parent.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y.
If X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
Please remove this only if it appears in reversed direction: parent(zed, yan).
Is Xia an ancestor of Abe?
Is Yan an ancestor of Bea?
